TextEquiv.PlainText: 1. gen Joeanna Gotamint en Woond te Kalutere
TextEquiv.Unicode: 1. gen Joeanna Gotamint en Woond te Kalutere

TextEquiv.PlainText: Francina Oias Woond in de hewdagam Korle
TextEquiv.Unicode: Francina Oias Woond in de hewdagam Korle

TextEquiv.PlainText: d=lo. susters soon daniel Van odengem: natalia in onecht getaeld -- - - - 32 --
TextEquiv.Unicode: d=lo. susters soon daniel Van odengem: natalia in onecht getaeld — - - - 32 —

TextEquiv.PlainText: 1 Mans broeders Weduwe donna Natalia tot Kolombo
TextEquiv.Unicode: 1 Mans broeders Weduwe donna Natalia tot Kolombo

TextEquiv.PlainText: don adriag Nainde do in sConings land
TextEquiv.Unicode: don adriag Nainde do in sConings land

TextEquiv.PlainText: dogter gen=t babie in orecht geteeld
TextEquiv.Unicode: dogter gen=t babie in orecht geteeld
